summary.headline: A Minimum-Viable-PNA (CLI vault): the two-store split holds and private data stays on disk. The communication, distribution, and MCP ACs are not-applicable because the design exposes no such surfaces.

citations.note: two separate SQLite files; the shared DB is opened read-only via ATTACH ?mode=ro

evidence.detail: Traced every write path; only the private DB is opened read-write, and the shared DB attaches read-only.

citations.note: per-invocation debounced snapshot with a 5-slot rotation ring
every record traces to the single configured vCard source; nothing introduced beyond it

findings.rationale: No Communications slot: the vault never reaches out, so the transport-selection AC is vacuous (the same way the MCP ACs are vacuous when no MCP server is exposed).
mcp-exposure pick is none; there is no MCP surface to gate cloud clients against.
